text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally here—the day of Bamboo Memory's
debut race.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo... I shall bear witness to your hard work
today.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Here, in your very first battle, I—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I wanna run! I wanna run! I wanna run! HRAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Good! My body's steady and my head's clear, but
my drive's shooting through the roof! All systems
are go!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep everything you taught me close to my
heart and throw everything I've got into my debut
race!
